spec_match.rationale: The console now exposes the current behavior tokens and modifiers: toolbar, tablist, radiogroup, listbox, menu, menubar, none, inline, block, wrap, nowrap, and nomemory.

interactive.rationale: The generated widget, DOM readout, copy button, and focus log remain interactive in source, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for live control testing.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now describes behavior-first grammar and DOM/ARIA inspection rather than stale axis-only options.

edge_cases.rationale: The console includes default modifiers, opt-out none, role mapping, and nomemory, but key behavior across each combination still needs browser evidence.

references.rationale: The page includes the required ChromeStatus link.

design_system.rationale: Badge text colors now use shared variables and the console keeps compact high-contrast controls.

openQuestions.title: Verify generated token combinations
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to change each behavior, axis, wrap, and nomemory control, then keyboard-test at least toolbar, radiogroup block, tablist nomemory, listbox wrap, menu, menubar, and none.

summary: Static repair rebuilt the console around the current scoped focusgroup option set and removed obsolete axis-only controls.
